description: Handle disputes and chargebacks in multiparty/marketplace integrations
dispute_flow: 1. Buyer opens dispute (item not received, not as described, unauthorized)
2. PayPal notifies platform and seller via webhook
3. Seller/platform responds with evidence within dispute window
4. PayPal adjudicates or buyer/seller resolve directly
5. Resolution: refund, partial refund, or case closed in seller's favor

multiparty_considerations.platform_responsibility: Platform may need to act on behalf of sellers for dispute responses
multiparty_considerations.fee_handling: Platform fees may be affected by dispute resolution
multiparty_considerations.seller_notification: Platform should notify sellers of disputes immediately
multiparty_considerations.evidence_collection: Platform may need to coordinate evidence from seller

best_practices: Subscribe to dispute webhooks for real-time notification
Respond to disputes within the required window (typically 10 days)
Track dispute rates per seller for platform health monitoring
